desc:
There is a long line of people waiting outside a run-down building.

Inside, people in hoods are distributing something to the visitors.

"I thank the ocean's blessings."

"No, no. We only wish to help you sate your hunger, even a little. ... Hm?"

"We haven't seen you around here. Clearly, you've traveled far to get here—welcome, welcome."

"Sorry, everyone—please understand, they're new here."

People in hoods dragged us inside.

"It's not much, but... this should hopefully be able to sate your hunger."

Dried fish, huh... Amiya and Irene called them "finbeasts".

options.message: Let the other people have it first.
result:
There were people staring hungrily at our food, so we quietly handed it over.

They began to shovel in the food, as though they've missed more than a few meals.

Unless they slow down, they're going to make themselves sick...

Without any reason to stay, we left the building.

I felt a little prick on the back of my head, as though the hooded people were staring at us as we walked away, but...

we managed to quicken our pace and disappear.

options.message: Slip them into our bags and pretend we ate them.
options.messageDesc: Run a Gloom & Pride Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

1.title: Here, the Church of the Deep is giving out food made of Sea Terrors under the guise of relief to turn Iberians into Sea Terrors
successDesc:
"We're so glad you enjoyed the food."

"But... did you actually eat it, or...?"

{0} replies calmly: while the flavor was certainly unique, we did like it.

At that, they seemed to withdraw their suspicion and turned away.

"Glad to hear it."

"Please, come back any time, and we'll share some more."

Without any reason to stay, we left the building.

I felt a little prick on the back of my head, as though the hooded people were staring at us as we walked away, but...

... we managed to quicken our pace and disappear.
failureDesc:
"We're so glad you enjoyed the food."

"But... did you actually eat it, or...?"

{0} replies almost instantly: while the flavor was certainly unique, we did like it.

At that, they seemed to withdraw their suspicion and turned away...

"You didn't quite enjoy the food, did you?"

"Hiding it away instead of eating..."

Everyone turns around and looks at us, the hubbub instantly coming to a stop.

We momentarily froze up, but...

... the moment the hooded people began to run after us, we quickly got up and got away.
